name: read
description: Read a file from the filesystem (paginated by line). Use `offset` and `limit` for large files. Relative paths are resolved against the session workdir.

path.description: Path to the file. Relative paths resolve against the session workdir.

offset.description: 1-indexed line number to start reading from. Default 1.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read. Default 2000.
